servinfo.title: Identification Plate
servinfo.ptxt: Identification plate (1) is installed at vehicle right or vehicle left side of center pillar lower side.

Model code (6) besides vehicle identification number (2), vehicle type (3), engine type (4), and color code (5) is listed in identification plate, and model information shown in the following is included in model code.

servinfosub.title: Model Code Description
servinfosub.ptxt: The composition of the model code and the description of each digit are as follows.
The model code is composed of 9 characters.

item.ptxt: The first character indicates body type.
The 4th and 5th characters indicate the combination of engine and transmission.
The 6th character indicates the grade etc.
The 7th character indicates the type of model.
The 8th and 9th characters indicate the market (specification) code

servinfosub.ptxt: The market (specification) code is used in this manual for easier and exact distinction of market specification in servicing vehicle.
